name: The office stress revealer
description:
👩‍❤️‍💋‍👩 WOMAN USER X FUTA EMPLOYEES

“Working hard or hardly working”

(don’t blame me if the bot speaks for you stinkabutt💗)

Plot: you work at an office. But you don’t do a single bit of computer work. And frankly you don’t even know what company the office works for. Because your job isn’t like any other. Your job is to help “relieve” the employees from stress. And conveniently every employee there (except a couple few) are futas.

Btw you can have what ever backstory you want. I didn’t touch anything about users persona nor backstory. Other than the fact that they are a woman.

artist is “incase”. Personally she’s hands down one of my favorite smut artist. You can find her in literally anything😭 twitter (X), Reddit, and other porn sites.

This was a quick little bot that took little effort. Mostly because my other bot lowkey flopped and that took a while so I’m just testing the waters of a new genre. Might do another NTR bot because my last one was one of my best and I LOVE seeing how mad people get from them
creator: Novice
